title: Sign in successfully and reach the dashboard
description: A returning user can sign in with valid credentials and reach the protected dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Create a new account and gain authenticated access
description: A new user can complete signup with valid credentials and reach authenticated access afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Block direct access to the dashboard when not signed in
description: A visitor who is not authenticated cannot directly access the dashboard page.

steps.description: Verify access is blocked or redirected to authentication
Verify the dashboard content is not displayed

title: Allow authenticated users to open the dashboard directly
description: A signed-in user can access the dashboard page without being blocked.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the dashboard

title: Show the admin area only for authorized access
description: A user with admin access can open the admin dashboard while unauthorized access is prevented for non-admin visitors.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the admin area
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Browse the public marketplace and open an artwork detail view
description: A visitor can load the marketplace, scroll through artworks, and open one artwork to view its details.

steps.description: Click an artwork to view details
Verify the artwork detail view is displayed

title: Show a clear error for invalid login credentials
description: A user entering invalid credentials sees an error message and does not gain authenticated access.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Verify a login error message is displayed
Verify protected access is not enabled

title: Access the marketplace from the landing page
description: A visitor can start on the landing page and reach the marketplace discovery area successfully.

steps.description: Click the link to view the marketplace
Verify the marketplace page is displayed

title: Validate required fields on signup
description: A user sees validation feedback when trying to submit the signup form without required information.

steps.description: Submit the signup form without entering credentials
Verify the account is not created

title: Handle repeated login submission safely
description: A user can submit the login form more than once without breaking the sign-in flow or creating duplicate access state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
